title: AppointmentPlus - Healthcare Scheduling with Insurance Verification
problem: Healthcare providers need online scheduling with integrated insurance verification and patient intake.
solution: Online scheduling platform with insurance eligibility verification integration. Patient intake forms, appointment reminders, and workflow automation for healthcare practices.
technology: Online scheduling, eligibility API integration, patient intake
varden_fit: MEDIUM — Scheduling with integrated eligibility is a good model for European practices.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Scheduling is crowded but adding eligibility verification differentiates.
